candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.

Balancing line, not reported total.

candidates.why: Best clean total for short-term/current debt; excludes leases and aligns with financing-related current liabilities.
Current maturities of long-term debt are relevant, but this appears to overlap with the cleaner total current interest-bearing debt line.
Candidate shortlist item; valid if no cleaner current debt total existed.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is a cleaner reported total for current financing debt. Excluded 'Current leasing liabilities' per rule and avoided double counting with 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year'.

candidates.why: Direct match to current taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

Asset/receivable, opposite of payable.
Non-current deferred taxes, not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit current income tax liability line.
